message:
fix(js-scanner): fix then-without-catch rules and promiseall consistency

Fresh-eyes review uncovered additional bugs:

1. js.then-without-catch & js.async.then-no-catch:
   - The `has: pattern: .catch($CATCH)` approach was fundamentally broken
   - `.catch()` is NOT a descendant of `.then()` in the AST - it's the parent
   - Changed to `inside: pattern: $_.catch($$$)` with `stopBy: end`
   - Now correctly excludes `.then().catch()` chains

2. js.async.promiseall-no-try:
   - Added missing `return_statement` exclusion for consistency
   - Previously, `return await Promise.all(...)` would fire promiseall-no-try
     but NOT await-no-try, which was inconsistent behavior
   - Both rules now consistently exclude return statements

All 67 test cases pass. 0 warnings on clean fixtures.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1896,8 +1896,9 @@ rule:
   all:
     - pattern: $P.then($ARGS)
     - not:
-        has:
-          pattern: .catch($CATCH)
+        inside:
+          pattern: $_.catch($$$)
+          stopBy: end
     - not:
         inside:
           kind: try_statement
@@ -1917,8 +1918,9 @@ rule:
   all:
     - pattern: $P.then($ARGS)
     - not:
-        has:
-          pattern: .catch($CATCH)
+        inside:
+          pattern: $_.catch($$$)
+          stopBy: end
     - not:
         inside:
           kind: try_statement
@@ -1940,6 +1942,10 @@ rule:
         inside:
           kind: try_statement
           stopBy: end
+    - not:
+        inside:
+          kind: return_statement
+          stopBy: end
 severity: warning
 message: "await Promise.all() without try/catch; wrap to handle aggregate failures"
 YAML
